name: HITOTSU NO MORI
short_description: A long time ago, beings called "demons" lived on this island. Extremely large and powerful, they ran amok without restraint, devastating fields and villages and bringing misery to the people. That is when the Guardian Beasts, companions of the gods, appeared.
detailed_description:
A long time ago, beings called "demons" lived on this island.

Extremely large and powerful, they ran amok without restraint,
devastating fields and villages and bringing misery to the people.

That is when the Guardian Beasts, companions of the gods, appeared.

Combining their powers, the six Guardian Beasts fought a desperate battle
and successfully sealed away the demons.

In order to recover from their injuries,
and to keep watch over the sealed-away demons,
the Guardian Beasts took up residence in the forests of the island.

And so, many years passed...
about_the_game:
A long time ago, beings called "demons" lived on this island.

Extremely large and powerful, they ran amok without restraint,

That is when the Guardian Beasts, companions of the gods, appeared.

Combining their powers, the six Guardian Beasts fought a desperate battle

In order to recover from their injuries,
and to keep watch over the sealed-away demons,
the Guardian Beasts took up residence in the forests of the island.

And so, many years passed...
supported_languages: Simplified Chinese, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
